verses.text: En un, sanggamte pumkhat suakin a tut khawm uh ciangin bangzahin hoihin nuam ahi hiam
Tua pen a puan ngawng tungah Aaron' khamul kaisuk zui-in a lu tung panin a taaksuk, sathau manpha tawh kibang hi
Tua pen Zion mualte tungah a kia, Hermon mual pana hong piang daitui tawh kibang hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in nuntak tawntungna thupha tua munah a pia hi.
